title: Characteristics of Sinusoidal Functions
text: Recall that sinusoidal functions describe oscillations or cycles that repeat over a fixed period and have a consistent maximum and minimum value (amplitude).

title: Identify Key Features
text: What are the defining characteristics of a sinusoidal function's graph?

title: Examples of Periodic Phenomena
text: Think about natural occurrences or physical systems that naturally repeat in a cycle, like tides, sound waves, or the swing of a pendulum.

hintAnswer: B) The height of a tide
title: Consider Real-World Examples
text: Which of these phenomena exhibits a regular, repeating cycle? A) The growth of a tree, B) The height of a tide, C) The trajectory of a thrown ball, D) The population of a city.
choices: A) The growth of a tree
B) The height of a tide
C) The trajectory of a thrown ball
D) The population of a city
